website.title: Beyond the Pale Brewing Company. Located in Ottawa selling beer. – Beyond The Pale Brewing Company
website.metaDescription: Ottawa based homegrown brewery. What started as a talk over some home brews, has grown into the business before you. Located in the heart of Ottawa at Unit 108, 250 City Centre, we now produce a wide range of amazing tasting craft beers. With a large taproom, patio and retail space open every day of week.

website.title: Home Page • The Merry Dairy
website.metaDescription: The Merry Dairy is Ottawa's home for nut-free original recipe frozen custard and premium ice cream. Scoops, pints, cakes, and shakes available in store. And throughout Ottawa with The Merry Dairy truck! Track the Truck at TheMerryDairy.com. Gift certificates and cakes also available for purchase online. 613-680-3144.
